mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.brand, p.name, p.price, p.discount_rate, p.delivery_fee, p.stock, p.pet_type, p.sub_category_id, p.created_at, pi.id as img_id, pi.image_url, pi.is_thumbnail, pi.sort_order FROM ( SELECT * FROM product
AND ( pet_type = #{petType} OR pet_type = 'all'
OR pet_type = 'both'
)
AND sub_category_id IN ( SELECT id FROM sub_category WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} )
ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit} ) p LEFT JOIN product_image pi ON p.id = pi.product_id ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC, pi.sort_order ASC

SELECT p.id, p.brand, p.name, p.price, p.discount_rate, p.delivery_fee, p.stock, p.pet_type, p.sub_category_id, p.created_at, pi.id as img_id, pi.image_url, pi.is_thumbnail, pi.sort_order FROM ( SELECT * FROM product
AND ( pet_type = #{petType} OR pet_type = 'all'
OR pet_type = 'both'
)
AND sub_category_id IN ( SELECT id FROM sub_category WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} )
ORDER BY price DESC LIMIT #{limit} ) p LEFT JOIN product_image pi ON p.id = pi.product_id ORDER BY p.price DESC, pi.sort_order ASC

SELECT p.id, p.brand, p.name, p.price, p.discount_rate, p.delivery_fee, p.stock, p.pet_type, p.created_at, pi.id as img_id, pi.image_url, pi.is_thumbnail, pi.sort_order FROM `petlog`.product p LEFT JOIN `petlog`.product_image pi ON p.id = pi.product_id WHERE p.id = #{id} ORDER BY pi.sort_order ASC

SELECT p.id, p.brand, p.name, p.price, p.discount_rate, p.delivery_fee, p.stock, p.pet_type, p.created_at, pi.id as img_id, pi.image_url, pi.is_thumbnail, pi.sort_order FROM product p LEFT JOIN product_image pi ON p.id = pi.product_id
AND (p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.brand LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND ( p.pet_type = #{petType} OR p.pet_type = 'all'
OR p.pet_type = 'both'
)
AND p.sub_category_id = #{categoryId}
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, pi.sort_order ASC

SELECT p.id, p.brand, p.name, p.price, p.discount_rate, p.delivery_fee, p.stock, p.pet_type, p.created_at, pi.id as img_id, pi.image_url, pi.is_thumbnail, pi.sort_order FROM product p LEFT JOIN product_image pi ON p.id = pi.product_id
AND ( p.pet_type = #{petType} OR p.pet_type = 'all'
OR p.pet_type = 'both'
)
AND p.sub_category_id = #{categoryId}
ORDER BY p.price ASC, pi.sort_order ASC
ORDER BY p.price DESC, pi.sort_order ASC
ORDER BY p.id DESC, pi.sort_order ASC
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, pi.sort_order ASC
ORDER BY p.price DESC, pi.sort_order ASC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT id, image_url, sort_order FROM `petlog`.product_detail_image WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT id, product_id as productId, option_name as optionName, additional_price as additionalPrice, stock FROM `petlog`.`option` WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY id

SELECT p.id AS productId, p.name AS productName, p.brand AS brand, p.price AS price, p.discount_rate AS discountRate, p.delivery_fee AS deliveryFee, (SELECT pi.image_url FROM `petlog`.product_image pi WHERE pi.product_id = p.id AND pi.is_thumbnail = true LIMIT 1) AS imageUrl, o.option_name AS optionName, o.additional_price AS additionalPrice, #{quantity} AS quantity FROM `petlog`.product p LEFT JOIN `petlog`.`option` o ON o.id = #{optionId} AND o.product_id = p.id WHERE p.id = #{productId}
